scripts.clean: rm -f app/static/css/app.css app/static/css/maplibre-gl.css app/static/js/app.js app/static/js/arc.js app/static/js/ol.js
scripts.vendor: mkdir -p app/static/css/files && cp node_modules/@fontsource-variable/geist/files/*.woff2 app/static/css/files/ && cp node_modules/maplibre-gl/dist/maplibre-gl.css app/static/css/maplibre-gl.css && cp node_modules/ol/dist/ol.js app/static/js/ol.js && cp app/assets/theme.js app/static/js/theme.js
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:css && bun run build:js && bun run vendor
